description:
This table details the re-classification and merging of land cover/land use (LCLU) classes within MAES (Mapping and Assessment of Ecosystems and their Services) Level 4 for Riparian Zones. It compares "MAES Level 4 2012 Riparian Zones" classes (left column) with "MAES Level 4 New Riparian Zones" classes (right column), indicating where multiple old classes are merged into a single new class using an 'X' in the "merging" column.

The table shows the following re-classifications and merges:
- **
